title: Policy: Restore Defaults with Policy applied
scenario: Verify that policy-locked settings remain unchanged when a user performs a "Restore Defaults" action on a device via the mobile app.
steps: Apply a policy to a device that locks certain settings (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other configurable options).
Open the mobile app and navigate to Settings > Reset Device > Restore Defaults.
Check the settings that were affected by the policy to see if they remain locked.
Verify that the values of those policy-affected settings have not changed.
expected: Settings affected by the policy remain locked and their values are unchanged after the Restore Defaults action.
